element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Three-button directional shooting mechanic is core to all gameplay
Optional advanced control scheme allowing D-Pad aim instead of button combinations
Extra protection/shield that absorbs one hit
Score-based collectibles with no mechanical impact

element_introduction_order.element: Named boss enemies (Bandit Bill, Ninja, Cheyenne River, Fort Wingate, Wingate)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Each stage culminates in confrontation with distinctly-themed antagonist

typical_tension_triggers: Getting caught between obstacle and bottom of screen (instant death)
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Relentless upward-scrolling pressure with cyclical intensity peaks at boss encounters; tension maintained by auto-scroll mechanic forcing constant forward momentum

spatial_grammar.secret_convention: Stage select accessible via Game Genie codes or button code at title screen (PUULPANG + KZKLGPVV for US version); hidden continue code in Japanese version

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introduction of basic three-button shooting mechanic and first collectible items (horse, boots, bullets); linear stage progression with named boss encounters
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Introduction of rifle upgrades and rarer power-ups; difficulty increases through enemy density and complexity of boss patterns
difficulty_curve.late_game: Yashichi extra life items become crucial; final boss confrontation against Wingate family leader
notable_spikes: Each stage transition introduces new themed boss enemy
Boss Music accompanies significant difficulty increase (stages 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6 each have distinct boss encounters)

notable_level_patterns.description: Each of 6 named stages features a unique boss encounter: Bandit Bill, Ninja, Cheyenne River, Fort Wingate, and final Wingate confrontation; stages are themed around their boss identities
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Stage 1: Bandit Bill encounter; Stage 3: Ninja encounter

notable_level_patterns.description: Screen automatically scrolls upward throughout play; player dies if caught between obstacle and bottom of screen, creating inherent time pressure and spatial constraint
Defeating enemies yields collectible items in progression: common point items (stars, bottles, bags, dragonflies), mid-tier upgrades (horse, boots, bullets, rifle), rare utility (yashichi extra life)
